place: Bang Por, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Hillside Four-Bedroom Villa with Infinity Pool & Panoramic Views
blurb: A contemporary four-bedroom villa set high in the Bang Por hills, with a horizon-edge pool and panoramic views over Koh Samui's green interior to the sea beyond. Around 600 m² of open-plan living on a generous 2,106 m² plot, completed in 2017 and offered move-in ready.
detail:
Set high in the peaceful hills above Bang Por on Koh Samui's quieter north-west coast, this four-bedroom villa pairs clean contemporary architecture with natural timber and stone. Stacked, deep-eaved floors step down the slope, opening through walls of glass to an elevated terrace and a horizon-edge pool that seems to hang above the treetops.

Inside, open-plan living and dining flow to a sleek island kitchen, all framing the same sweeping outlook across the island's green interior toward the sea. Vaulted ceilings and full-height glazing keep the spaces light and airy, with a natural, understated material palette throughout.

All four bedrooms are en-suite, each with its own access to a balcony or terrace and the view, and the principal suite takes the prime elevation. Over roughly 600 m² across two floors, the layout balances easy entertaining with private retreat, and the home adds covered parking and rooftop solar.

Completed in 2017 and offered move-in ready on a generous 2,106 m² plot, the villa sits a short drive from Bang Por's quiet beach and seafood restaurants, with Maenam, Bophut's Fisherman's Village and the airport all within easy reach.

features.l: Minutes to Bang Por beach & seafood
